follow_up_turns.content: I mean the North Shore Chamber Orchestra of Fernridge, not the youth orchestra. Continue with that ensemble.

prompt: Search for the authoritative organization called “North Shore Orchestra.” If the name matches more than one official ensemble, stop and ask which one I mean. After clarification, fetch a primary leadership page naming the selected ensemble’s music director.
